summary: Both pre-registered criteria were met by the letter, but the accuracy gain is statistically indistinguishable from zero: the pooled paired 95% CI on per-row absolute-error difference includes zero, v2 wins only 1 of 3 held-out seasons (and is significantly WORSE in 2024), and QB regresses significantly. The features did not earn promotion; the site stays on v1.

pre_registered_rule.criterion_1_accuracy: v2 3-seed ensemble OVERALL walk-forward PPR MAE < v1's, and pinball_p50 not worse. Committed v1 bar 4.3263.
pre_registered_rule.criterion_2_calibration: fresh conformal refit lands held-out weekly coverage in [0.75, 0.85] for every position/season.
pre_registered_rule.note: Both models re-run through the same harness on the SAME current data; naive_last4 (4.612) and xgboost (4.450) were byte-identical across the two runs, confirming no data shift mid-evaluation. MAE and pinball_p50 are calibration-invariant, so v1 carrying calibration.json and v2 not cannot bias criterion 1.

season_level_effect.note: effect is ~1/4 of its own standard error across seasons

gate_2_calibration.note: conformal refit fit on each fold's VAL season (never the test season); val tails converged to ~0.100/0.101 against a 0.10 target.

decision.rationale: Criterion 1 was satisfied only in point estimate. A paired test on the 17,908 identical held-out rows puts the difference within noise, the sign of the effect flips across seasons, and QB degrades. Shipping would add live-pipeline surface (three more upstream nflverse columns) and a measurable QB regression to buy nothing that survives scrutiny.
decision.kept: v2 artifacts and the versioned feature-set infrastructure remain committed, so a future feature pack can reuse them without rework.

follow_up_hypotheses.observation: QB is the only position that regresses, and it is significant: paired mean +0.0815 PPR MAE, CI [+0.0395, +0.1241], n=1991.
follow_up_hypotheses.hypothesis: air_share is receiver-centric (share of team receiving air yards) and is structurally NaN/uninformative for QBs, so it may act as noise in the QB sequence channel; passing_air_yards is pulled but currently unconsumed and would be the QB-native analogue.
follow_up_hypotheses.discipline: NOT acted on here. Changing features in response to held-out results is tuning against test data. Any future test must be pre-registered before looking at 2023-25.
